rationale: Both papers center on consumer goal framing and performance mechanisms: the citing paper tests goal-program design effects on preference/persistence, while the cited paper examines how goal specificity and construal shape saving success via perceived importance/difficulty. Given this strong conceptual overlap and exact DOI match (10.1509/jmr.09.0516), the citation is plausibly a substantive theory/mechanism source rather than an obvious incidental mention.
